Who We Are

Crafting Iconic Spaces Across the UAE

T&Z Golden Building Construction LLC brings a proven track record from Russia and Azerbaijan to Dubai. Having successfully delivered 60+ government and large-scale projects across Moscow and Baku, we now bring that same international expertise and uncompromising quality to the UAE market.

From government-certified construction in Moscow to luxury villa renovations in Baku — and now premium fit-outs and builds across Dubai — every project carries our signature commitment to precision and excellence.

60+Completed Projects
15+Years Experience
50+Skilled Professionals
100%Licensed & Insured
What We Do

Our Core Services

End-to-end construction solutions tailored to your vision.

01

Villa Renovation

Complete transformation of residential villas — structural, interior, and exterior — tailored to your lifestyle and taste.

02

Interior Fit-Out

Premium fit-out services for residential and commercial spaces — flooring, ceilings, partitions, joinery, and luxury finishes.

03

New Construction

Full-cycle new build projects from foundation to finishing — residential, commercial, and mixed-use developments.

04

MEP Works

Mechanical, electrical, and plumbing installations by certified professionals meeting all Dubai municipality standards.

05

Project Management

Dedicated project managers ensuring timelines, quality control, and seamless coordination from concept to handover.

06

Maintenance & Repair

Ongoing maintenance contracts and one-off repair services keeping your property in perfect condition year-round.

Why Choose Us

The T&Z Golden Difference

We don't just construct buildings — we build lasting relationships through transparency, craftsmanship, and results that exceed expectations.

  • Licensed & Fully Compliant

    Fully registered with Dubai Municipality and all relevant UAE authorities.

  • On Time, Every Time

    Our structured project management ensures strict deadline adherence without compromising quality.

  • Premium Materials Only

    We source only the finest materials from certified suppliers.

  • Transparent Pricing

    Detailed quotations with no hidden costs. What we quote is what you pay.

  • Post-Completion Support

    Dedicated after-service support and maintenance packages.
